zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie於1405年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾吉爾斯時，她的父親Alexander Livingstone of Callendar31歲，母親Janet Dundas21歲。她於1417年與Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年1月1日在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡焦福享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie于1405年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾吉爾斯时，她的父亲Alexander Livingstone of Callendar31岁，母亲Janet Dundas21岁。她于1417年与Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie在英国苏格兰斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年1月1日在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡焦福享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie was born in 1405, in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, was 31 and her mother, Janet Dundas, was 21. She married Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie in 1417, in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 January 1439, in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie est née en 1405, à Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Janet Dundas, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie en 1417, à Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1439, à Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Sie hat 1417 in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Lei sposato Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie nel 1417, nel Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonieが1405年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアキルシスで生まれた時，父Alexander Livingstone of Callendarは31歳，母Janet Dundasは21歳であった。1417年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカレンダー パークでSir John Sibbald Of Balgonieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年1月1日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカドゾウで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie(이)가 1405년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 킬시스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Livingstone of Callendar(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Dundas(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 캘렌더르 박에서 Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 1월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카드즈에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie родилась в 1405 г. в местности килсит, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander Livingstone of Callendar было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Janet Dundas, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie в 1417 г. в местности каллендар парк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 января 1439 г. в местности кадзоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
